module.name: phyto_image_sec
module.description: Protects product images by automatically watermarking them with your shop logo at a configurable position, opacity, and size whenever images are uploaded or regenerated, and can optionally embed the product name as a text overlay. Also generates compressed WebP sibling files alongside each image for faster page loads, and embeds IPTC copyright metadata. A JavaScript layer blocks right-click, drag-to-desktop, and Ctrl+S on product, category, and search pages, while a batch tool applies watermarks to all existing catalogue images at once.
module.author: PhytoCommerce
